events.title: Legacy batch 1: YOLO26l & YOLOv9m on stratifikasi + sawit-yolo
events.notes_md: Ran 4 experiments on old datasets (dataset-yolo-stratifikasi and sawit-yolo-dataset) using YOLO26l and YOLOv9m. These use old splits with potential image-level leakage.

runs.summary: YOLO26l on dataset-yolo-stratifikasi. Lowest tier — B4 very weak.
YOLO26l on sawit-yolo-dataset. Slightly better than stratifikasi on mAP50.
YOLOv9m on stratifikasi. Big jump over YOLO26l — recall much higher.
YOLOv9m on sawit-yolo. Best among batch 1 — strong B1 and B3.

events.title: Legacy batch 2: damimas-full + YOLOv9c on all old datasets
events.notes_md: Ran 5 more experiments: YOLO26l & YOLOv9m on damimas-full, plus YOLOv9c on all 3 old datasets. YOLOv9c on damimas-full achieved best overall mAP50.

runs.summary: YOLO26l on yolo-damimas-full. Clean DAMIMAS-only data helps — better B4 than old datasets.
YOLOv9m on damimas-full. Lower mAP50-95 than YOLO26l here surprisingly.
YOLOv9c on damimas-full — BEST legacy run. mAP50=65.0%, strong across all classes including B4.
YOLOv9c on stratifikasi. Decent but below damimas-full performance.
YOLOv9c on sawit-yolo. B4 better than stratifikasi but still weak.

events.title: Meeting: lock split strategy with lecturer
events.notes_md:
Lecturer wants comparison with SAME test set:
- Train all (damimas+lonsum) → test
- Train damimas only → test
- Train lonsum only → test

Composition: damimas split separately, lonsum split separately, combined = merge of both.
Use 2 seeds (42, 123) and 2 models (YOLO26 and YOLOv9).
Analyze per-class performance.
Tree-level split to prevent leakage.

events.title: Dataset preparation: tree-level split for v2 experiments
events.notes_md:
Created 3 datasets with tree-level split (no image leakage):
- DAMIMAS: 854 trees → 3596 images (train:2504, val:560, test:532)
- LONSUM: 99 trees → 396 images (train:276, val:60, test:60)
- COMBINED: merge of both → 3992 images (train:2780, val:620, test:592)

All verified: no tree appears in multiple splits.

events.title: V2 evaluation: YOLO26l & YOLOv9c on combined test set (3 scenarios × 2 seeds)
events.notes_md:
Evaluated all 12 v2 models on shared combined test set (592 images, damimas+lonsum).

## Kenapa V2 (~50%) Terlihat Lebih Rendah dari Legacy (~65%)?

Angka 65% legacy (exp7 YOLOv9c) BUKAN performa sebenarnya — itu ter-inflate oleh 2 faktor. Cross-evaluation membuktikan bahwa **v2 justru lebih baik dari legacy** pada test set yang sama.

### Cross-Evaluation YOLOv9c (mAP50):
| Model | Legacy test (518) | V2 combined test (592) |
|---|---|---|
| Legacy yv9c_640 | 0.650 | 0.483 |
| V2 damimas/yv9c_42 | 0.599 | 0.505 |

Pada test set yang SAMA (v2 combined), **v2 menang**: 0.505 vs 0.483.
Pada mAP50-95, gap lebih besar: **v2=0.230 vs legacy=0.161 (+43%)**.

### Dekomposisi Gap (YOLOv9c, mAP50):
```
Legacy on legacy test:  0.650
  ↓ -0.051 (35%) — Leakage removal (tree-level split)
V2 on legacy test:      0.599
  ↓ -0.094 (65%) — Domain shift (lonsum in test set)
V2 on combined test:    0.505
```

### Faktor 1: Image-Level Leakage di Legacy (~35% of gap)
Legacy pakai image-level split → pohon yang SAMA bisa muncul di train & test. Model 'menghafal' tampilan pohon → performa test ter-inflate ~5 poin mAP50.

### Faktor 2: Lonsum di Test Set V2 (~65% of gap)
Test set v2 combined berisi damimas + lonsum. Model yang dilatih damimas-only tidak pernah lihat distribusi visual lonsum (kebun berbeda, kondisi berbeda). Ini menyebabkan domain shift ~9.4 poin mAP50. Legacy model bahkan drop LEBIH besar (0.167) saat ditest pada combined, menunjukkan legacy lebih 'overfit' ke damimas.

### Kesimpulan:
- V2 models lebih robust dan generalize lebih baik
- Lonsum standalone (276 train imgs) terlalu kecil untuk train model yang baik
- Menambah lonsum ke combined training hampir tidak membantu (all_data ≈ damimas_only)
- Untuk paper: gunakan v2 combined test sebagai benchmark utama, report per-domain jika perlu

## Key Findings:
- YOLOv9c > YOLO26l di semua scenario
- Best overall: damimas_only/YOLOv9c seed42 (mAP50=0.505, mAP50-95=0.230)
- B1 paling mudah dideteksi (mAP50 ~0.85), B4 paling sulit (~0.09-0.33)
- Seed variation minimal — model stabil
- Lonsum-only models sangat rendah (mAP50 ~0.21-0.31) karena training data terlalu sedikit

runs.summary: YOLO26l seed123 trained on all_data (damimas+lonsum). mAP50=0.461 on combined test. Cross-eval: 0.560 on legacy damimas-only test (+0.099), menunjukkan lonsum di test set menekan metrik. B1 strong (0.804), B4 weak (0.270).
YOLO26l seed42 trained on all_data. mAP50=0.457 on combined test. Cross-eval: 0.586 on legacy damimas-only test (+0.129). Seed variation minimal vs seed123 (0.457 vs 0.461).

YOLOv9c seed123 trained on all_data. mAP50=0.505 on combined test. Cross-eval: 0.615 on legacy damimas-only test (+0.110). Beats legacy yv9c_640 (0.483) on same combined test. mAP50-95=0.230 vs legacy 0.161 (+43% better localization).

YOLOv9c seed42 trained on all_data. mAP50=0.504 on combined test. Cross-eval: 0.604 on legacy damimas-only test (+0.100). Seed variation minimal vs seed123 (0.504 vs 0.505). B4 recall lebih tinggi (0.432 vs 0.339) dibanding seed123.

YOLO26l seed123 trained on damimas_only (3596 imgs). mAP50=0.469 on combined test. Cross-eval: 0.550 on legacy damimas-only test (+0.081). Performa hampir sama dengan all_data (0.469 vs 0.461) — lonsum training data terlalu kecil untuk berdampak.

YOLO26l seed42 trained on damimas_only. mAP50=0.465 on combined test. Cross-eval: 0.585 on legacy damimas-only test (+0.120). Sangat dekat dengan legacy exp5 (0.594) di test set yang sama — tree-level split hanya drop ~1 poin.

YOLOv9c seed123 trained on damimas_only. mAP50=0.500 on combined test. Cross-eval: 0.604 on legacy damimas-only test (+0.104). Legacy yv9c_640 di test yang sama: 0.650 → gap 0.046 murni dari tree-level split (no leakage).

YOLOv9c seed42 trained on damimas_only. BEST V2 MODEL: mAP50=0.505, mAP50-95=0.230. Cross-eval: 0.599 on legacy damimas-only test. Beats legacy yv9c_640 on combined test (0.505 vs 0.483). mAP50-95 jauh lebih baik (0.230 vs 0.161) — localization quality superior.

YOLO26l seed123 trained on lonsum_only (276 train imgs). mAP50=0.232 on combined test. Cross-eval: 0.271 on legacy damimas-only test — tetap rendah bahkan di damimas. Training data terlalu sedikit (276 imgs vs 2504 damimas). Distribusi visual lonsum sangat berbeda dari damimas.

YOLO26l seed42 trained on lonsum_only. WORST MODEL: mAP50=0.211 on combined test. Cross-eval: 0.232 on legacy damimas test. B2 hampir tidak terdeteksi (R=0.084, mAP50=0.113). B4 juga sangat buruk (mAP50=0.093). Insufficient training data.

YOLOv9c seed123 trained on lonsum_only. mAP50=0.257 on combined test. Cross-eval: 0.311 on legacy damimas test. YOLOv9c sedikit lebih baik dari YOLO26l pada data terbatas (+0.025 mAP50). B1 masih terdeteksi lumayan (0.525) tapi B4 hampir gagal (0.074).

YOLOv9c seed42 trained on lonsum_only. BEST LONSUM MODEL: mAP50=0.307 on combined test. Cross-eval: 0.328 on legacy damimas test. Meskipun best di lonsum, masih jauh di bawah damimas-trained models (~0.50). Seed42 notably better than seed123 (0.307 vs 0.257) — lebih beruntung di data split kecil.

events.title: Presentasi hasil evaluasi v2 ke dosen
events.notes_md:
Presentasi hasil evaluasi v2 (12 runs) yang dilakukan tanggal 4 Maret.

Topik utama:
- Perbandingan v2 vs legacy (cross-evaluation)
- Analisis per-kelas B1/B2/B3/B4 across 3 skenario
- Dekomposisi gap: leakage removal vs domain shift
- Rekomendasi langkah selanjutnya
